supply_chain.dependencies: Coal supply from Navajo Transitional Energy Company for Four Corners Power Plant through 2031; Nuclear fuel cycle dependencies including uranium mining, conversion, enrichment, and fabrication with contracts through 2028-2031; Natural gas transportation agreements through 2052
supply_chain.risks: Fuel supply availability; Water supply limitations in southwestern United States; Supply chain constraints for critical spare parts and equipment; Prolonged drought conditions affecting water resources for thermal generation; Dependence on coal suppliers for Four Corners operations through 2031

regulatory_risks: Arizona Corporation Commission rate regulation and cost recovery uncertainty
Federal Energy Regulatory Commission wholesale power and transmission rate regulation
Nuclear Regulatory Commission licensing and safety requirements for Palo Verde operations
EPA environmental regulations including greenhouse gas emissions standards for power plants
EPA Coal Combustion Residuals Rule compliance and corrective action requirements
EPA Effluent Limitation Guidelines requiring zero discharge standards
EPA Good Neighbor Plan for nitrogen oxide emissions
EPA Mercury and Air Toxics Standards revisions
Ozone National Ambient Air Quality Standards compliance
Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, Endangered Species Act, RCRA, and Superfund compliance
Arizona renewable energy standard and tariff requirements
Energy efficiency standards and demand side management obligations
Potential retail electric market deregulation in Arizona
NERC mandatory electric reliability standards with penalties up to $1.2 million per day per violation
State and local environmental permits and approvals
Water rights adjudication proceedings in Arizona and New Mexico
Navajo Nation and tribal land lease and right-of-way requirements
DOE spent nuclear fuel disposal obligations and breach of contract
Price-Anderson Nuclear Industries Indemnity Act liability limits
FERC transmission rate formula adjustments
Arizona ballot initiatives and referenda affecting utility regulation
Potential changes to Arizona Corporation Commission retail electric competition rules
Climate change legislation and carbon regulation uncertainty
California AB 32 greenhouse gas cap-and-trade program requirements
California SB 219, SB 253, and SB 261 climate-related disclosure mandates
PURPA qualifying facility contract requirements
Dodd-Frank Act derivatives trading restrictions
